  • Classes in com.distributed2pc.common.dto used by com.distributed2pc.common.dto
    Class
    Description
    SystemEventDto
    Generic event broadcast over WebSocket to the UI via /topic/events.
    TransactionRequest
    Request body for initiating a new 2PC transaction via the coordinator REST API.
  • Classes in com.distributed2pc.common.dto used by com.distributed2pc.common.simulation
    Class
    Description
    SimulationConfigRequest
    Request payload for enabling or disabling the redundancy / recovery protocol on any node (coordinator or participant).

  • Classes in com.distributed2pc.common.dto used by com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.metrics.api
    Class
    Description
    MetricsResponse
    Response DTO used by the coordinator's metrics endpoint to expose transaction outcome statistics and the current simulation configuration to the UI.

    Class
    Description
    MetricsResponse
    Response DTO used by the coordinator's metrics endpoint to expose transaction outcome statistics and the current simulation configuration to the UI.

    Description
    ParticipantRegistrationDto
    Registration payload sent by a participant to the coordinator at startup.

    Class
    Description
    ParticipantRegistrationDto
    Registration payload sent by a participant to the coordinator at startup.
  • Classes in com.distributed2pc.common.dto used by com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.api
    Class
    Description
    TransactionRequest
    Request body for initiating a new 2PC transaction via the coordinator REST API.
    TransactionResponse
    Response returned by the coordinator after a transaction has been initiated or completed.
  • Classes in com.distributed2pc.common.dto used by com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.infrastructure
    Class
    Description
    AbortMessage
    Message sent by the coordinator to participants during Phase 2 to abort a transaction.
    CommitMessage
    Message sent by the coordinator to participants during Phase 2 to commit a transaction.
    PrepareMessage
    Message sent by the coordinator to each participant during Phase 1 of the 2PC protocol.
    VoteMessage
    Participant response to a PREPARE message (Phase 1 of 2PC).
  • Classes in com.distributed2pc.common.dto used by com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.api
    Class
    Description
    PeerLogEntryDto
    Participant's local log entry for a transaction.
